parameters.name: ={{ (() => { const ks = $('ParsePDF2JSON').first().json.kitchenSheet || {}; const rawName = String(ks.eventName || '').toUpperCase().trim(); const parts = rawName.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean); const first = parts[0] || 'EVT'; const meal = parts[parts.length - 1] || ''; const prefix = first === 'PHOENIX' ? 'PHX' : first.slice(0, 3); const dateStr = String(ks.eventDate || '').trim(); const dt = DateTime.fromFormat(dateStr, 'ccc, LLL d, yyyy'); const ymd = dt.isValid ? dt.toFormat('yyyyLLdd') : dateStr.replace(/\D/g, '').slice(0, 8); return prefix + '-' + ymd + (meal ? '-' + meal : ''); })() }}

nodes.name: ParsePDF2JSON
nodes.notes: Parse PDF data to KitchenSheet JSON data

values.content:
=Extract the data from the following kitchen sheet and return ONLY the JSON object matching the strict schema:

{{ $json.text }}

parameters.queryString: ={{ (() => { const ks = $('ParsePDF2JSON').item.json.kitchenSheet || {}; const rawName = String(ks.eventName || '').toUpperCase().trim(); const parts = rawName.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean); const first = parts[0] || 'EVT'; const meal = parts[parts.length - 1] || ''; const prefix = first === 'PHOENIX' ? 'PHX' : first.slice(0, 3); const dateStr = String(ks.eventDate || '').trim(); const dt = DateTime.fromFormat(dateStr, 'ccc, LLL d, yyyy'); const ymd = dt.isValid ? dt.toFormat('yyyyLLdd') : dateStr.replace(/\D/g, '').slice(0, 8); const fileName = prefix + '-' + ymd + (meal ? '-' + meal : ''); const folderId = '10822eRE0ZsS2B_iN8nZX5tURHXRrB6us'; return "name = '" + fileName + "' and '" + folderId + "' in parents and trashed = false"; })() }}

## If Kitchen sheet exists
